hindiTranslation: संकल्पसे उत्पन्न होनेवाली सम्पूर्ण कामनाओंका सर्वथा त्याग करके और मनसे ही इन्द्रियसमूहको सभी ओरसे हटाकर ॥
englishTranslation: Abandon every desire born of resolve, and restrain the whole field of the senses on all sides with the mind alone.
essence: Desire loses power when the mind stops feeding it.
speaker: Krishna
